query:
DELETE FROM release_note_acknowledgements WHERE releaseNoteId = 30001;
SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.active, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.releaseNoteId = rn.id WHERE rn.id IN (30001, 30002) GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.active ORDER BY rn.id ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute DELETE FROM release_note_acknowledgements WHERE releaseNoteId = 30001;
SELECT rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.active, COUNT(rna.id) AS acknowledgement_count FROM release_notes rn LEFT JOIN release_note_acknowledgements rna ON rna.releaseNoteId = rn.id WHERE rn.id IN (30001, 30002) GROUP BY rn.id, rn.title, rn.body, rn.active ORDER BY rn.id ASC;

rows.title: Community Care: app polish
rows.body: Small app polish is live: you can now swipe between sections, boost tokens are tucked away until tapped, and the mobile top three is easier to read. Tap below so everyone knows this update was seen.

rows.title: Community Care: Proof page edits
rows.body: Proof has been cleaned up: media is easier to browse, reactions and comments are live, and Deep Thought now shows the right interpretation. Tap below to confirm you have seen the Proof update.
